case_title: UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION vs. FUENTES, MARIA LORENA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUENTES, MARIA LORENA FUENTES, ALICIA JAUNA $5,611.65 PRINCIPAL, $2,010.84 INTEREST, $120.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,742.99, $7,742.99 AS TO DEFT ALICIA JAUNA FUENTES, ADDITIONALLY, $5,611.65 AS TO DEFT MARIA LORENA FUENTES; STIPULATED--SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-23-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OR AS TO WHY NO DEFAULT OR DISMISSAL HAS BEEN FILED.
